name: Sopa Castilla La Vieja (Almond Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Bread, toasted - cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the consomme' and water in a large pot until boiling.
2. Mix the ground blanched almonds and olive oil together in a small bowl.
3. Add the almond mixture to the soup and stir until well blended.
4. Pour the soup into individual heat-proof bowls.
5. Top each bowl with toasted bread strips.
6. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the top of the soup.
7. Broil under low heat until the cheese is golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and sprinkle with additional toasted sliced almonds before serving.
